name: Tripe Florentine
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Parmesan or Romano cheese, freshly grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Parboil tripe for about 30 minutes. Drain and cool.
2. Slice the tripe into 1/2-inch wide pieces.
3. Heat a little oil in a large frying pan and sauté the tripe quickly until browned.
4. Add the carrots, celery, onion, parsley, and garlic to the pan. Sauté for a few minutes.
5. Stir in the tomato sauce, beef stock, and wine. Season with oregano, bay leaf, basil, salt, and pepper.
6. Simmer the sauce for a few minutes, then add the tripe pieces.
7. Cover and cook on top of the stove for 1-1/2 hours, or until tender. Alternatively, bake in a moderate oven.
8. When ready to serve, sprinkle with grated Parmesan or Romano cheese. Serve with pasta.
